zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Sutton於1306年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾杜德利時，她的父親John Sutton I21歲，母親Margaret Somery16歲。她於1327年之前與Sir Roger Hillary在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1356年6月20日在英國斯塔福爾瓦爾薩爾享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾瓦爾薩爾。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of Katherine , derived from the pet form Kit + the hypocoristic suffix -y. It is also used as an independent given name.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Sutton was born in 1306, in Dudley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Sutton I, was 21 and her mother, Margaret Somery, was 16. She married Sir Roger Hillary before 1327, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 20 June 1356, in Walsall, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Walsall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Sutton est née en 1306, à Dudley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Sutton I, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Somery, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger Hillary avant 1327, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 juin 1356, à Walsall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Walsall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat vor 1327 in England Sir Roger Hillary geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Juni 1356 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Walsall, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Walsall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Suttonが1306年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアダドリーで生まれた時，父John Sutton Iは21歳，母Margaret Someryは16歳であった。1327年以前にイギリスでSir Roger Hillaryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1356年6月20日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアワルサルで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアワルサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Sutton(이)가 1306년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드들리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Sutton I(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Somery(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1327년 이전 영국에서 Sir Roger Hillary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1356년 6월 20일 영국 스태퍼드실르 월사에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 월사에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Roger Hillary antes 1327, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Sutton родилась в 1306 г. в местности дудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Sutton I было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Somery, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger Hillary перед 1327 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 июня 1356 г. в местности валсалл, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности валсалл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
